title: cuphea lutea
intro: Cuphea lutea, also known as the yellow cuphea or yellow bush, is a flowering plant species within the family Lythraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Cuphea lutea are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
